customtooltips.tooltip_list_screen.title: Manage Tooltips
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.title: Edit Tooltip
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.targe: Accepts tags §b(e.g. #c:swords)§f or item ids §b(e.g. minecraft:diamond_sword)
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.custo: Inline color/formatting codes (e.g., §c&c§r, §l&l§r) only work with the Solid style. Use the toggles below for gradient text formatting.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.color: Choose the primary color using the visual picker.
Choose the secondary color (used for Gradients) using the visual picker.

Leave empty to use the visual picker above.

Valid formats:
§7Minecraft color names (e.g. '§6gold§7')
Legacy formatting codes (e.g. '§d&d§7')
Hex color codes: §c#FF0000§7, §a00FF00§7, §b0x0000FF§7, §ex0000FF§7
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.posit:
Top §7(Under the item's name)§r
Bottom §7(Bottom of the tooltip)§r
Replace Name §7(Replaces the item's name)§r
Replace All §7(Replaces the entire tooltip)§r
Append §7(End of a line)§r
Prepend §7(Start of a line)§r
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.line_:
Offsets the line position in the tooltip.
Accepts positive integers if position is set to §6Top§r, §6Replace Name§r, §6Append§r, §6Prepend§r, or negative integers if position is set to §6Bottom§r.
If the displayed text should be §lbold§r.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.itali: If the displayed text should be §oitalic§r.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.under: If the displayed text should be §nunderlined§r.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.strik: If the displayed text should be §mstrikethrough§r.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.obfus: If the displayed text should be §kobfuscated§r (obfuscated).
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.requi: If the tooltip requires pressing the §6Shift§r key to display.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.empty: Adds an empty line before the tooltip.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.anima: Animation offset that desynchronizes different animations.
customtooltips.tooltip_edit_screen.tickr: Speed of the animation. Closer to 0 is higher speed.
customtooltips.tooltip_list_widget.delet:
Are you sure you want to delete
the tooltip for %s?
customtooltips.toast.keybind_missing.des: You can set a Keybind to open this menu easily!
customtooltips.toast.config_backup.title: Config parsing error!
customtooltips.toast.duplicated.title: Entry duplicated!
customtooltips.toast.color.invalid.title: Invalid color
customtooltips.toast.color.invalid.desc: A color is invalid. Defaulting to the visual picker.
